scripts.setup: bun run setup:env && bun install && bun run setup:db
scripts.setup:env: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('.env')){fs.copyFileSync('.env.example','.env');console.log('Created .env from .env.example')}else{console.log('.env already exists, skipping')}"
scripts.setup:db: bun x prisma generate --schema ./packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma && bun x prisma migrate deploy --schema ./packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma
